title: CO5 9DF, Indaver Rivenhall Limited: environmental permit issued -  EPR/CP3906LP/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Indaver Rivenhall Limited Installation name: Rivenhall Integrated Waste Management Facility Permit number: EPR/CP3906LP  "
